title: rosa × dumetorum var. spinetorum
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. spinetorum, also known as the Rosa spinetorum, is a hybrid rose species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The Rosa × dumetorum var. spinetorum plant is used to treat various health issues such as fever, headache, and digestive problems, and it is also believed to have antioxidant and antiseptic properties that promote overall health and well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used in essential oil form for its therapeutic benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
